title: micranthes astilboides
intro: Micranthes astilboides, also known as the mountain saxifrage, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Micranthes astilboides include its ability to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and benefits.
